error_signature: image slider shows on top of the mobile and tablet default menu
title: Image slider overlaps mobile and tablet menu
symptom: The image slider is displayed above the mobile and tablet default menu, obstructing it. Adjusting the z-index values did not resolve the issue.
applies_when: Viewing on mobile or tablet devices
not_this_if: The issue does not occur on desktop devices
root_cause: The z-index values set for the image slider and the menu may not be sufficient to control their stacking order due to other CSS rules or parent elements affecting the layout.
fix_steps: Open the custom CSS settings for the image slider
Set a higher z-index value for the slider than the menu
Save the changes and refresh the page
agent_instruction: Adjust the z-index in the custom CSS for the image slider to ensure it is lower than the menu.
